name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
⋆ ˚｡ 🗡 | Hitman!Ghost | You and Ghost had a perfect marriage. A nice house, the bills were paid even if the money came from bloodstained hands — you two were hit men. Hiding each other's jobs for years, your dirty secret has always been under the rug, until, he's hired to kill you, and you, to kill him.

Creator's note: yeah another playlist again 🙄
